office_does: A state representative writes and votes on state laws and budgets, conducts oversight, and represents their legislative district.
race_blurb: The incumbent's infrastructure and environmental investment record faces a democratic-socialist universal-services platform and a tax-and-budget-restraint alternative.

candidates.summary: Nance is the incumbent representative and Maritime Caucus vice chair emphasizing ferries, environmental protection, families, and health-care training.
highlights: Prioritizes ferries, Puget Sound protection, child care, and health-care training [S1]
Cites major ferry, workforce-training, and forest-protection investments [S1]

spending.basis: He centers substantial public investment in ferries, workforce training, and family services.

climate.basis: He prioritizes Puget Sound protection and cites forest conservation.

experience.basis: He is the incumbent representative with a legislative leadership role.

candidates.summary: Lillegard is a community-health board member and party officer advocating universal health care, public transit, school funding, living wages, and affordable housing.
highlights: Supports universal health care and equitable school funding [S1]
Supports faster transit, living wages, and sustainable affordable housing [S1]

spending.basis: Her platform calls for broad expansion of public health, transit, education, and housing investment.

experience.basis: She has organizational and professional experience but no documented elected record.

healthcare.basis: She explicitly supports universal health care.

candidates.summary: Byrd is an information-technology professional emphasizing affordability, policing, balanced budgets, essential services, and opposition to a state income tax.
highlights: Opposes a state income tax and supports balanced budgets [S1]
Supports law enforcement alongside help and shelter for mentally ill people [S1]

taxes.basis: He explicitly opposes a state income tax.

spending.basis: He prioritizes balanced budgets while preserving education and essential-service funding.

safety.basis: He combines law-enforcement support with shelter and services for mentally ill people.

experience.basis: He brings private-sector experience but no documented elected record.
